notes: Covers all listed surgical procedures up to sub-limit. Pre-authorisation required for elective surgery. Cosmetic surgeries excluded.
ICU charges covered up to ₹10,000 per day. Maximum 15 days per hospitalisation. Prior approval required for admissions exceeding 7 days.
Single private room covered up to ₹5,000 per day for Gold plan. Silver plan: shared room up to ₹2,500 per day. ICU room covered separately under CL-002.
In-hospital medicines and consumables covered up to sub-limit. OPD medicines covered only under Gold plan with valid prescription.
OPD consultations and diagnostics covered only under Gold plan. Requires referral from primary physician for specialist consultations. Annual limit applies.
Covers listed daycare procedures not requiring 24-hour hospitalisation. Pre-authorisation mandatory. Limited to approved daycare procedure list.
Maternity benefits available only under Gold plan. 9-month waiting period applies. Covers normal delivery, C-section, and newborn care up to 90 days. Pre-existing pregnancy excluded.
Dental treatments are excluded from all plans unless arising from an accident. Accidental dental injury claims to be processed under accidental benefit rider.
